column1: #   IGNORE — rule is disabled (no alerts raised).
#   LOW    — only HIGH and MEDIUM severities raised.
#   MEDIUM — only HIGH severity raised (default for most rules).
#   HIGH   — suppress unless severity is CRITICAL-equivalent.
# Keep this file short. Every suppression is a deliberate decision — document
# WHY in the comment. Review quarterly; suppressions rot.

column3: X-Content-Type-Options: set at CDN, not app. Revisit if CDN changes.
Incomplete-or-no-cache-control: static asset routes intentionally long-lived.
Permissions-Policy: TODO — audit and enable with a concrete policy.
